_description: Official player status registry. Only players with confirmed retirement announcements are marked 'retired'. Source: official announcements, BCCI, team press releases.

retired._note: Players who have officially announced retirement from IPL

SR Tendulkar.note: Retired from all cricket after 2013 IPL season

R Dravid.note: Released after 2013, retired from competitive cricket

V Sehwag.note: Formally retired from all cricket including IPL in 2015

Yuvraj Singh.note: Announced retirement from international cricket and IPL in June 2019

SK Raina.note: Retired from IPL, unsold in 2022 auction, announced retirement from all cricket in 2023

AB de Villiers.note: Retired from all cricket in November 2021

CH Gayle.note: Last IPL match in 2021, retired from franchise cricket

SR Watson.note: Retired from all cricket after IPL 2020 final

SL Malinga.note: Retired from franchise cricket after 2019 IPL, last played 2019

Harbhajan Singh.note: Retired from all forms of cricket in December 2021

BB McCullum.note: Retired from IPL, moved to coaching

DJ Bravo.note: Retired from IPL after 2022 season, moved to coaching CSK

KA Pollard.note: Last IPL match 2022, moved to MI coaching role

A Nehra.note: Retired from all cricket in November 2017

G Gambhir.note: Retired from all cricket in December 2018, last IPL 2019 auction unsold

RV Uthappa.note: Announced retirement from all cricket in September 2023

PA Patel.note: Released after 2020, effectively retired from IPL

S Badrinath.note: Last IPL 2014, retired from competitive cricket

IK Pathan.note: Retired from all cricket in January 2020

Z Khan.note: Retired from cricket, last IPL as DD captain 2017

P Kumar.note: Last IPL 2017, retired from professional cricket

R Ashwin.note: Retired from all cricket including IPL in late 2024/early 2025

S Dhawan.note: Officially retired from all forms of cricket in August 2024

KD Karthik.note: Announced retirement from all cricket after IPL 2024

NV Ojha.note: Last IPL 2019, retired from professional cricket

DR Smith.note: Last IPL 2018, retired from franchise cricket

MK Tiwary.note: Last IPL 2019, effectively retired from IPL

R Vinay Kumar.note: Last IPL 2018, retired from professional cricket

active._note: Players confirmed active for IPL 2026 (retained, bought at auction, or confirmed by franchise)
